name: travel-hacking-toolkit
description: Travel hacking skills and MCP servers for flights, hotels, points, miles, and award planning.

interface.shortDescription: Search flights, hotels, awards, points, and loyalty programs
interface.longDescription: Use travel-hacking workflows inside Codex to compare cash and award flights, search hotels and portal inventory, inspect loyalty balances, optimize transfers, and plan trips with real-time MCP servers plus reusable skills.
defaultPrompt: Plan a trip to Paris with the best flights, hotels, and points strategy
Compare all award and cash options for SFO to Tokyo
Find the best hotel booking path with FHR, Edit, and points
